base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dodongo_walk_eat_bomb — a character (boss) from 1986 legend of zelda. Dodongo — orange triceratops-like. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Dodongo — orange triceratops-like; boss of Level 2 (Moon). 2-frame walk + 1 eat-bomb frame. Defeat trick: feed bombs (eats = dies); sword-only kills 2× harder
